message:
feat(core): add decision provenance capture to replay stream with sensitivity tiers

Wires pattern-match and policy-evaluation decisions into the replay capture
pipeline, enabling deterministic replay of the control plane's decision
history with redaction-aware sensitivity classification.

replay_capture.rs (+1,075 lines):
- CaptureRedactionPolicy config for controlling what gets captured
- CaptureSensitivityTier (T1Standard/T2Sensitive/T3Restricted) with serde
- DecisionEvent and DecisionType types for structured decision provenance
- FNV1a-based hashing for deduplication of decision inputs
- Retention tombstone markers for expired/redacted capture segments
- SharedCaptureAdapter for thread-safe capture from multiple pipeline stages

policy.rs (+105 lines):
- Redactor now derives Clone for sharing across pipeline stages
- PolicyGatedInjector gains decision_capture field and set_decision_capture()
- authorize() path now serializes policy input/output into DecisionEvents
  with full provenance when capture adapter is active

runtime.rs (+72 lines):
- Clones replay_capture handle into event-processing task
- Pattern detection now returns (detections, rule_definition_by_id) tuple
- Feeds detection events into capture adapter with DecisionType::PatternMatch
  including rule definition text, decision output, and timestamps

patterns.rs (+29 lines):
- New PatternEngine::rule_definition_text() method returning canonical JSON
  of a rule definition for content-addressable hashing in replay streams
- Two unit tests for the new method

recorder_query.rs (+18 lines):
- Refactored classify_event_sensitivity() from indirect SensitivityTier::classify
  to explicit match on RecorderRedactionLevel for clarity and correctness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
